# Chapter 3: Corrosion, wear, environmental degradation  (~100 pp)
- 3.1 Corrosion failure mechanisms revisited at depth (18) · 3.2 Environmental cracking (12) · 3.3 Hydrogen embrittlement (12) · 3.4 Wear in operating systems (12) · 3.5 Bioenvironmental failure (medical implants, marine systems) (15) · 3.6 Failure section (case): Mianus River Bridge, Erika, Boeing 707 oxygen-line corrosion (31)

**Archetype**: failure, transport. **Project**: assess corrosion risk for one infrastructure asset in the reader's environment; recommend monitoring. **Exercises**: 25.
